name: Pralines
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare several layers of newspaper and place on a flat surface.
2. Place a layer of wax paper on top of the newspaper. The newspaper layers are important because the candy mixture will be very hot.
3. Combine all ingredients except vanilla in a large saucepan.
4. Bring to a boil and cook until it reaches the soft ball stage (238-240 degrees) on a candy thermometer.
5. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla.
6. Keep stirring until the nuts no longer come to the top of the mixture.
7. Quickly drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto the prepared wax paper.
8. Allow to cool, then remove from wax paper and store.
